mapper.select: SELECT session_id, uis_code, client_ip, user_agent, um_code, created_at, last_active_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_SESSION WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_IP_AUTH_SESSION (session_id, uis_code, client_ip, user_agent, um_code, created_at, last_active_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{uisCode}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{umCode}, NOW(), NOW())
